Petition For Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Oct-25-2006 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Sep-27-2006 Continued To Oct-25-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: James Barringer appearing for petitioners and settlor. Bette Epstein appearing for Regions Bank and Penny Priest Burkitt, trustee and beneficiary of a companion trust. Parties are making considerable progress. If they can come to a stipulaltion, it can be submitted exparte. Matter is continued to 10/25. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Petition For Modification Of Trust

MINI MINUTES: James Barringer appearing for petitioners. Bette Epstein appearing for Regions Bank, trustee of another trust. Both counsel are in agreement to continue this matter. Parties are having settlement discussion. Matter is continued to 9/27. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Susan Lee. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
